ModMetaData.name: Morrowind Menus & Trading
ModMetaData.author: OpenAI for Johnny Berry
ModMetaData.description: Morrowind Menus & Trading replaces the pawn inventory UI with a Morrowind inspired layout and turns colonist personal inventories into large, shared, stockpile like logistics pools. Colonists prioritize filling personal inventories before stockpiles, retrieve needed goods from storage, trade resources between pawns by role, optionally idle at trader spots, and count carried resources in the top left resource display.
